title: Data Privacy and Protection Policy
required_training_roles: Data Engineer, Software Developer, DevOps Engineer

sections.heading: Data Classification
sections.text: All data assets must be classified according to the four-tier classification scheme: Public, Internal, Confidential, and Restricted. Classification determines the applicable security controls.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.text: Personal data must not be retained beyond the specified retention period unless required by law. Automated deletion workflows must be implemented for all data stores containing PII.

sections.heading: Subject Access Requests
sections.text: All data subject access requests must be acknowledged within 48 hours and fulfilled within 30 calendar days as required by applicable privacy legislation.
sections.human_instructions: Route all SARs through the DPO office. Track in the SAR register.
